Video.summary: We reveal plans to transform a '61 Chevy Impala into "Red Sled." Then an appraisal on the finished LeMans.
Video.title: Project Red Sled Debut

Video.summary: '61 Impala frame enforcement, Air Ride suspension system installation, and driving Year One's '67 Mustang.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Frame Work

Video.summary: We powder coat a 61 Impala's frame and explore the allure of a 67 Corvette Stingray.
Video.title: '61 Impala - Red Sled Bodywork

Video.summary: We continue on a 1969 Firebird, taking off the rusty sub-frame and modifying the Impala, known as 'Red Sled'.
Video.title: Red Sled Sheet Metal

Video.summary: We tackle rust and lead filler removal on the 1961 Impala, restoring its trunk and body panels.
Video.title: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Image.alt: Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out
Red Sled Gets the Lead Out

Video.summary: We revamp a classic Impala with a 409 engine and hit the Year One Experience for muscle car fun.
Video.title: Red Sled gets a 409

Video.summary: Rick and Tommy finish Red Sled's steering, clutch and Air Ride systems. Learn how to rebuild a starter.
Video.title: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Image.alt: Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride
Red Sled Steering, Clutch and Air Ride

Video.summary: Red Sled is finished. Look back at the entire build, and ride along on her maiden voyage.
Video.title: Red Sled Hits the Road

Video.summary: Brad Starks' '32 Ford Coupe: a classic hot rod rebellion packing a supercharged LT4 with 680hp!
Video.title: Brad Starks - 1932 Coupe

Video.summary: Johnson's Hot Rod Shop's '32 Ford Roadster: a wild, hot pink, 500hp drivable masterpiece!
Video.title: Johnson Hot Rod - 32 Roadster

Video.summary: We're testing our new C-10 project, putting this old Chevy on a wild ride to plan our custom cruiser upgrades.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender
Chevy C-10 - Part 1: Auto Cross Pretender

Video.summary: We begin teardown of our Chevy C-10 and mockup the new suspension for better handling.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation
Chevy C-10 - Part 2: Building the Foundation

Video.summary: We convert a long bed to short bed and install a rear step notch to drop our C-10
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice
Chevy C-10 - Part 3: Slice and Dice

Video.summary: We shorten Cream Puff's frame, show you our short bed options, and then start the new bed assembly.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed
Chevy C-10 - Part 4: Making The Bed

Video.summary: We build a trans tunnel and wheel tubs in our 72 Super Cheyenne for a lowered stance.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 5: Tunnel Vision

Video.summary: We clean up our 1972 C-10 front end with relocated hood hinges and a custom bed frame.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 6: Bed Redefined

Video.summary: We install the engine and trans, make brake lines, then fab a clean, simple exhaust on our 1972 C-10.
Video.title: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Image.alt: Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework
Chevy C-10 - Part 7: Powertrain to Pipework

Video.summary: It's BIGFOOT #1! The legendary truck that started the entire monster truck industry.
Video.title: Bigfoot

Video.summary: Tommy picks up a wounded pony, and Rick shows best ways to lay down paint, this week on MuscleCar.
Video.title: Fox Body Pony - Part 1

Video.summary: Dark Horse gets a stroker motor, and Rick shows how to set up your paint gun and spray candy paint.
Video.title: Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course

Image.alt: Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course
Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course
Dark Horse/ Candy Paint Crash Course

Video.summary: Dark Horse gets a top end and exhaust, plus Rick shows the difference between cast and forged wheels.
Video.title: Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust

Image.alt: Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust
Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust
Dark Horse Top End and Exhaust

Video.summary: Dark Horse loses its interior, but gains a roll cage.
Video.title: Dark Horse Interior Tear-Away

Video.summary: Dark Horse takes a trip to the paint booth, and Flashback features a rare AMC Pony Car.
Video.title: Dark Horse Paint & Body

Video.summary: Dark Horse is buttoned up, then heads to the track, but then the guys have an issue!
Video.title: Dark Horse Stage 1 Complete!

Video.summary: We upgrade our F-250 with a gooseneck hitch, airlift suspension, and enhanced brakes for heavy hauling.
Video.title: Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling

Image.alt: Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling
Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling
Ford F-250 Project Part 1: Heavy Hauling

Video.summary: Our Ford F-250 gets a few more features added to help performance and function while hauling.
Video.title: Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features

Image.alt: Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features
Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features
Ford F-250 Project Part 2: Functionality Features

Video.summary: This 1970 Mustang will take a 50 year leap into the future, and we're building it to give away!
Video.title: EBC Mustang Sweepstakes Project

Video.summary: The Detroit Muscle team dives into building a solid foundation for this Resto Mod.
Video.title: Mustang Backside Alterations

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang has to hook and stick to the ground.
Video.title: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Image.alt: A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic
A 50 Year Old Mustang Needs New Suspension Magic

Video.summary: The EBC Fastback Mustang is transformed.
Video.title: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Image.alt: Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation
Putting the Fast in Fastback/Coyote Transformation

Video.summary: Our 1971 Chevy Caprice, Project Fat Stack, ROARS to life after almost a year of work.
Video.title: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Image.alt: Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green
Fat Stack – Part 14: Clean, Mean, and Candy Green

Video.summary: See if your top ten muscle car list matches ours.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 1

Video.summary: Have we missed any? Here is the conclusion of our top 10 American Muscle Cars.
Video.title: Top 10 American Muscle Part 2

Video.summary: Ford’s high-revving modern engine gets some racy parts, then it is put to the test in the dyno cell!
Video.title: Coyote Power

Video.summary: Eric and Joel unearth the Cummins-crown-jewel dually diesel, a ’93 Dodge Ram W350.
Video.title: Diesel Diamond in the Rough

Video.summary: The guys inject some power into their B-series Cummins with a VE to P pump swap on their 93 Dodge Dually.
Video.title: Pump It Up

Video.summary: The MuscleCar guys are in search of a '69 Chevy Camaro to transform into a COPO tribute car.
Video.title: COPO Camaro

Video.summary: We yank out our old suspension, upgrade the underside of our Diesel Dually, and give new disc brakes.
Video.title: Lift & Shift

Video.summary: Our Dodge Dually, Project Nightshift, will shed its skin today as we buzz off all the imperfections.
Video.title: Prime Time Axle Folly

Video.summary: Get your brushes ready because our Dodge Diesel Dually, Nightshift, is turning to the dark side.
Video.title: One-ton, Two-tone Transformation

Video.summary: We lay down the freshly painted back end on our 1993 Dodge W350.
Video.title: Bedtime

Video.summary: '93 Dodge Dually gets rebuilt transfer case, turbo plumbing, and brake line tips.
Video.title: Project Nightshift: Working Overtime

Video.summary: 1993 Dodge Ram Dually gets wiring fixed, seats installed, door panels refurbished, and a maiden voyage.
Video.title: Project Nightshift Putting in Work

Video.summary: This project will result in a diesel rig by combining both old and new, Dodge chassis and Ford cab.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 1

Video.summary: We'll straighten out our 1997 Dodge frame before setting our 1979 Ford F-350 body on it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair
Super Dually Part 2: Body Swap & Frame Repair

Video.summary: We're modifying our 1997 Dodge frame before bolting our 1979 F-350 body to it.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment
Super Dually Part 3: Frame Modification and Body Fitment

Video.summary: Super Dually gets a coating of sound insulation and spray-on bed liner.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation
Super Dually Part 5: Sound Insulation & Bedliner Installation

Video.summary: Project: SuperDually gets new a new steering shaft, headlights and under hood paint.
Video.title: Super Dually Part 8

Video.summary: We're adding a water/methanol kit to a '05 Dodge Ram 2500 diesel and a cold air kit to Project Super Dually.
Video.title: Diesel Power Upgrades

Video.summary: Project Super Dually gets a new interior and bumpers!
Video.title: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Image.alt: Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!
Super Dually Part 11 - New Interior & Custom Bumpers!

Video.summary: What do you get when you cross a ’53 Willys and an ’84 military CUCV….one heck of an off-road mud wagon!
Video.title: CUCV Mud Wagon

Video.summary: We embark on Project Copperhead, a classic 1967 Chevy truck build from the ground up.
Video.title: Copperhead Suspension

Video.summary: Turning a '67 Chevy into Project Copperhead, featuring custom brakes, relocated gas tank, and polished wheels.
Video.title: Copperhead Chassis

Video.summary: We upgrade Project Copperhead with a powerful 572 Chevy crate engine.
Video.title: Copperhead Engine

Video.summary: Stacey digs into Project Copperhead's interior, filling it up with new seats, dash, door panels, you name it.
Video.title: Copper Head Interior

Video.summary: Making aftermarket parts work together can be hard, but Stacey will show you how to make it work.
Video.title: CopperHead Details

Video.summary: Our 1967 C10 Project Copperhead is finished and ready to hit the pavement.
Video.title: CopperHead Payoff
